pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh logic. Note: The prompt says 77.8023 W which mathematically equates to -77.8023.

Task description, cross-referenced with real-world NORAD catalogs via web search to confirm the IDs correctly match the stated satellites (ISS=25544, SO-50=27607, AO-7=7530, AO-85=40967, AO-91=43017).

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to configure GPredict with a new synthetic ground station Tussey_Mountain (lat 40.7270, lon -77.8023, alt 640) and a new module FieldDay set to UTC time. All 5 required satellites are real, and their NORAD IDs provided in the prompt strictly match real-world catalogs (ISS=25544, SO-50=27607, AO-7=7530, AO-85=40967, AO-91=43017). Additionally, a major bug was discovered during the audit: the file verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
